title: CandidateDNA
description: Schema for a CandidateDNA — traces candidate lineage without proving authorship truth, correctness, or model quality.

candidate_dna_id.description: Unique identifier for this CandidateDNA record

candidate_artifact_ref.description: Reference to the candidate artifact whose lineage this records

source_modelworkpacket_ref.description: Reference to the ModelWorkPacket that produced the candidate

source_context_capsule_ref.description: Reference to the context capsule used during generation

source_gaptext_ref.description: Reference to the gaptext instructions used during generation

source_slot_contract_ref.description: Reference to the slot contract that shaped the generation

source_route_class.description: Scale ladder route class used for generation

generation_path.description: Ordered list of processing steps that produced this candidate

constraint_refs.description: References to constraints applied during generation

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence supporting the generation trace

privacy_class.description: Privacy classification of the candidate content

content_hash.description: Hash of the candidate content for integrity reference (not authorship proof)

content_ref.description: Optional reference to candidate content instead of raw content

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary — what this DNA traces and does not prove

candidate_only.description: Must be true — DNA is lineage trace, not acceptance proof

non_claims.description: Explicit list of things this DNA does not claim or prove
